ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "subscription_status" TEXT /* Subscription status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "email_templates" (
  "template_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each email template */,
  "template_name" TEXT /* Name of the email template */,
  "template_content" TEXT /* Content of the email template */,
  "template_type" TEXT /* Type of email template (e.g., sign-up, plan selection) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the template was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the template */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the administrator who created the template */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the administrator who last updated the template */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("template_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_email_templates_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES admins ("admin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_email_templates_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES admins ("admin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the notification */,
  "template_id" INTEGER /* ID of the email template used for the notification */,
  "send_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject of the notification */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, failed, pending) */,
  "sent_by" INTEGER /* ID of the administrator who sent the notification */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the email service used to send the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_template_id FOREIGN KEY ("template_id") REFERENCES email_templates ("template_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES email_services ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., sign-up, plan selection) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date the activity occurred */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the activity was recorded */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the activity (e.g., plan name for plan selection) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activities_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "email_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each email log */,
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* ID of the notification that generated the log */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of log (e.g., open, click) */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date the log was generated */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the log (e.g., URL clicked) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_email_logs_notification_id FOREIGN KEY ("notification_id") REFERENCES notifications ("notification_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "email_services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each email service */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the email service */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for the email service */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the service was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the service */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the administrator who added the service */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the administrator who last updated the service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_email_services_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES admins ("admin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_email_services_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES admins ("admin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notification_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification setting */,
  "template_id" INTEGER /* ID of the email template */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the email service */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the notification setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the notification setting */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the setting was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the setting */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the administrator who created the setting */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the administrator who last updated the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notification_settings_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES email_services ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notification_settings_template_id FOREIGN KEY ("template_id") REFERENCES email_templates ("template_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notification_settings_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES admins ("admin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notification_settings_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES admins ("admin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subscriptions" (
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subscription */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "template_id" INTEGER /* ID of the email template */,
  "subscription_status" TEXT /* Subscription status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the subscription was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the subscription */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the administrator who created the subscription */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the administrator who last updated the subscription */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subscription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subscriptions_template_id FOREIGN KEY ("template_id") REFERENCES email_templates ("template_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subscriptions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subscriptions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES admins ("admin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subscriptions_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES admins ("admin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admins" (
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each administrator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the administrator */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the administrator */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the administrator (e.g., super admin, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the admin account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the admin account */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the admin's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log */,
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the administrator who performed the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., create template, update setting) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date the activity occurred */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the activity (e.g., template ID for template creation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_admin_id FOREIGN KEY ("admin_id") REFERENCES admins ("admin_id")
)
